name: Houston Students Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: YES Prep Public Schools (incl. East End Secondary) — one of two transportation vendors alongside First Student
recent_news: Operates as 'Huerta Bus Service' (7743 Elwood St, Houston 77012); long-standing Houston family-owned school bus contractor serving YES Prep charter network. Mixed customer reviews (2.4-2.8 stars) re: driver behavior; no M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: More substantive than peers — verified active YES Prep contract gives recurring charter-school revenue base. Family-owned with succession potential; warrants outreach to confirm fleet scale before progressing.
